data.body: Kickoff. snap turned down; rebar adopts shared resources from snap-demo-tfstate shared state. User decisions: (1) re-home full auth_host SSO stack + wildcard cert into rebar; (2) run live terraform import/apply this session. AWS authed as acct 896586841071 (profile frontier, creds via aws configure export-credentials). Pre-existing rebar drift = 1 un-applied SSM placeholder /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key (intended, commit 586302cf2); my apply will create it as CHANGEME. Inventory confirmed: OIDC provider (adopt only, not snap github_deploy role), acm.tf wildcard cert x3, auth_sso.tf (cookie-signing SSM secret + google secret data src), auth_host.tf (~16 res: Lambda+APIGWv2+CloudFront+DNS A/AAAA+origin secret). Plan: retag Project=rebar, PRESERVE physical snap-demo-* names (rename=recreate), import random_passwords with live values, gate apply on clean plan, then terraform state rm from snap shared state.
